research_recommended_route: Die-struck challenge coin, 2.0–2.25 in dia, antique bronze finish, optional edge text

title: Ceramic Mug Wood Base
description: Ceramic Mug Wood Base is a drinkware concept tuned for Supabase’s green-on-charcoal visual language.
production: Start from a food-safe blank and keep decoration durable. Prefer FSC wood or walnut base.
tags: ceramic | mug | wood | base.png | desk
specs: Capacity: roughly 12–16 oz. | Use a food-safe blank, glaze, or coating. | Optional wood base or lid for premium editions.
notes: Source image: 1448×1086px | Folder: Award Concepts | Good candidate for a 50–100 unit pilot run.
research_recommended_route: Stock ceramic mug with wood lid/coaster + local engraved base/badge (recommended over custom ceramics)
research_supplier: DiscountMugs / Bagmasters blanks + local wood CNC shop
research_packaging: Die-cut EPS/EPE or molded pulp inserts; single-wall retail cartons are not enough
research_cautions: Hand-thrown/custom ceramic version is border-line; glaze variance and breakage rise sharply
research_summary: The stock-blank route is viable; the handmade premium route stretches to ~57 days and higher variance.

research_recommended_route: Stock ceramic mug with wood lid/coaster + local engraved base/badge (recommended over custom ceramics)
research_supplier: DiscountMugs / Bagmasters blanks + local wood CNC shop
research_packaging: Die-cut EPS/EPE or molded pulp inserts; single-wall retail cartons are not enough
research_cautions: Hand-thrown/custom ceramic version is border-line; glaze variance and breakage rise sharply
research_summary: The stock-blank route is viable; the handmade premium route stretches to ~57 days and higher variance.
